---
title: "Cardio — Project Summary"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: last-modified
---

## Overview

The **Cardio** sub-project characterizes the cardiopulmonary (echocardiographic) phenotype of HRS-AKI patients in the [HARMONY Terlipressin Registry](../../Terlipressin/docs/) — focused on echos performed **before** terlipressin initiation.

## Cohorts

**Echo cohort** — at least one of these REDCap availability flags is `0`
(measurement present):

- `echo_ef_notavailable___999` — Ejection fraction
- `echo_late_notavailable___999` — Lateral e′ velocity
- `echo_gls_notavailable___999` — Global longitudinal strain
- `echo_earatio_notavailable___999` — Mitral E/A ratio
- `echo_eeratio_notavailable___999` — E/e′ ratio

**Pre-terli echo cohort** — echo cohort AND
`days_to_echo < days_to_terli_initiation_day0`. All Table 1s and the spline
model use this cohort.

## Outputs

| # | Output | Stratifier | Notes |
|:--|:-----|:-----------|:------|
| 1–3 | Counts of patients by echo timing | — | echo before / same-day / after terli, within echo cohort |
| 4 | Demographics Table 1 | `hrs_responders` (3-level) | ~55 demographic and clinical variables |
| 5 | Echo Table 1 | `hrs_responders_cat_2` (binary) | 5 continuous echo measurements |
| 6 | Echo Table 1 | `terli_ae_respfail` | 5 continuous echo measurements |
| 7 | Echo Table 1 | `time_to_death_status_90days` | death capped at 90 days |
| 8 | Cubic-spline logistic regression | outcome `hrs_responders_cat_2` | `ns(echo_ef, df = 3)`; predicted-probability plot with 95% CI |

## Pipeline

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[final_master_01282026.xlsx<br/>main Terlipressin project] --> B[Source shared_pipeline.qmd]
    B --> C[Echo cohort<br/>any non-NA echo availability flag]
    C --> D{Echo timing<br/>vs days_to_terli_initiation_day0}
    D -- before --> E[Pre-terli echo cohort]
    D -- same day --> F[Counted only]
    D -- after --> G[Counted only]
    E --> H[Tasks 4–7<br/>stratified Table 1s]
    E --> I[Task 8<br/>EF cubic-spline LR]
```

## Repository Structure

| File | Description |
|:-----|:-----------|
| `docs/analysis.qmd` | Canonical analysis — sources shared pipeline, runs all 8 tasks |
| `Code/cardio 2026.Rmd` | Older analyst version (abnormal-flag thresholds) — superseded |
| `Code/Cardio.Rmd` | Earlier analyst version — superseded |
| `Requests/Echo Data Request 01292016.docx` | Original analyst specification |
| `Results/` | Rendered CSV outputs |
